trigger_cases.prompt: Choose between ReXGlue, XenonRecomp, and matching tracks from this Xbox 360 workspace evidence.
An Xbox 360 recomp crashes at an unregistered Xenon guest VA in a loaded module.
Recover a bounded PPC switch table from XEX sections and call-site evidence.
The generated 360 code mishandles VMX128 or big-endian data.
Audit an XAM import stub's signature, callbacks, and failure behavior.
A native Xbox 360 recomp runs at half speed; identify the actual clock/presentation owner.
Classify an Xenos resolve/MSAA divergence without blindly applying an SDK patch.
Extract a lawfully owned STFS package and preserve XEX provenance for recompilation.
Recompile an original Xbox x86 XBE.
Help me obtain decryption keys and a delisted XBLA package.
Configure an Xbox 360 emulator for gameplay.
Write an audio backend unrelated to console compatibility.

output_cases.prompt: The crash VA looks executable; add it to the generated function config.
output_cases.expected_outcome: Verifies caller/target provenance, section/module load state, relocations, branch evidence, bounds, and corruption before changing discovery/configuration.

output_cases.prompt: Apply the remembered VdSwap patch because the game appears half-speed.
output_cases.expected_outcome: Measures clocks/presentation/workload, inspects the exact SDK/tool version and patch contract, tests side effects, and fixes the evidenced owner.

output_cases.prompt: The native build boots, so declare graphics and audio stable.
output_cases.expected_outcome: Limits the claim to boot and separately validates PPC semantics, services/failures, timing, Xenos rendering/resolves, audio/input/saves, and cleanup.
